outputFormatRule: Return publish-ready HTML only when generating final articles. Do not output Markdown fences, editor notes, or placeholder instructions.
languageRule: Write reader-facing content in the site language. Internal configuration may be maintained in the operator's working language.
htmlStyleRule: Follow the site's style-reference.json for article containers, headings, FAQ blocks, tables, callouts, CTA blocks, and visual rhythm.
sourceOfTruthRule: Use site.json, author.json, knowledge.json, links.json, style-reference.json, project-instructions.md, and the keyword row as the source of truth.
